modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to determine who can remove collaborators on Google Docs.

full_description_text: A user inquired about the ability to remove collaborators on Google Docs during a phone call. They were unsure who has the authority to make these changes. The conversation focused on the permissions related to collaborator management.
short_description: Unable to determine who can remove collaborators on Google Docs.
description: A user inquired about the ability to remove collaborators on Google Docs during a phone call. They were unsure who has the authority to make these changes. The conversation focused on the permissions related to collaborator management.
